name: Blackened (Cajun) Arctic Char
recipeInstructions:
1 Melt butter in a cast-iron or heavy-bottomed frying pan over medium-high heat.
2 Add Cajun spice and heat thoroughly.
3 Place fillets in the pan. Squeeze juice of one lemon into the pan.
4 Cook fish for about 5 minutes on each side.
5 Serve with remaining lemon wedges and pan drippings.
